Home › Programmes › Diploma in Business Administration
Diploma Programme

Diploma in
Business Administration

The 2.5-year Diploma in Business Administration equips students with comprehensive understanding of accounting, marketing, finances, human resources, and information technology — enabling learners to choose their specialization. DIT has been running for 21 years with all courses approved by MQA and MOHE.

2.5 Years (Full Time) Intake: January, May & September
Enrol Now

Accreditation

Course Code: DBA MQA: PA13841 MOHE: KPT(N/340/4/0794) HRDF Claimable International ✓

Why Choose DIT?

  • ✓ Full scholarship & job placements from partner hospitals
  • ✓ MOHE & MQA accredited programmes
  • ✓ 30+ years affiliated with Damai Service Hospital
  • ✓ Practical placements at approved hospitals

Advantages of Studying at DIT

MOHE & MQA Accredited — All programmes approved by Ministry of Higher Education
PTPTN Loans — Financial assistance available for eligible Malaysian students
Hostel Accommodation — Established condominiums with full facilities nearby
Guaranteed Job Placements — Scholarship partnerships with partner hospitals
Qualified Faculty — Registered lecturers and clinical instructors
30+ Years of Excellence — Affiliated with the established Damai Service Hospital

Entry Requirements

Local Students

Possess SPM with at least THREE (3) Credits in any subjects
OR Possess SKM Level 3 in a related field
OR A Certificate (Level 3, MQF) in a related field with at least CGPA 2.00
OR Pass in Sijil Tinggi Pelajaran Malaysia (STPM) with at least Grade C (GP 2.0) in any subject
OR Pass in Sijil Tinggi Agama Malaysia (STAM) with at least Grade Maqbul
OR Other equivalent qualifications recognised by the Malaysian Government

International Students

Achieve a minimum Band 3 in Malaysian University English Test (MUET) OR equivalent to Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR High B1)

About This Programme

The 2.5-year Diploma in Business Administration equips students with comprehensive understanding of accounting, marketing, finances, human resources, and information technology — enabling learners to choose their specialization. DIT has been running for 21 years with all courses approved by MQA and MOHE.

Course Modules

1Semester 1

  • Principles of Marketing
  • Principles of Management
  • Introduction to IT Management
  • Business Mathematics
  • Organizational Behavior
  • Appreciation of Ethics & Civilizations

2Semester 2

  • Principles of Accounting
  • Sales Management Strategy
  • Advanced Communicative English

3Semester 3

  • Business Ethics
  • Accounting Management
  • Human Resource Management
  • Business Financial Management
  • Community Service
  • Islamic Studies / Moral Studies

4Semester 4

  • Microeconomics
  • Project Management
  • Digital Marketing Management
  • Business Law
  • Auditing

6Semesters 5 & 6

  • Business Communication
  • Business Statistics
  • Macroeconomics
  • International Business Management
  • Business Research Methodology
  • E-Commerce Development
  • Consumer Behavior
  • Entrepreneurship Development

7Semester 7

  • Industrial Placement

Career Prospects

Marketing AssociateAccounts ManagerAdministrative ManagerHuman Resource CoordinatorEntrepreneur

Future Education Pathways

→Diploma → Bachelor of Business Administration
→Bachelor of Business Management
→Advanced Certificates in HR Management / Marketing
